definition.currentPool: Top 115 by raw quality score, no sample floor.
definition.robustPool: Top 115 after warm/eligible-day floors and/or shrinkage toward the global mean.
definition.baseReplay: Full 115-player coverage under the current V3 cadence selector: 7 active dates warmup, then 7-date honest walk-forward retrains.

recommendation: Do not replace the live Rubbing Hands pool automatically. The robust pools remove tiny samples and show more daily players, but the current quality top115 remains the highest-accuracy replay. Use shrink35_min10warm12eligible if you want the best no-tiny-sample tradeoff.
